
> **Development stability gate:** this repository is tagged `pre-alpha` and `in-development`. External PRs are not evaluated for merge until the maintained school tool reaches a stable, fully functional 100% classroom release after the pre-alpha phase. Use PRs only for maintainer-approved internal stabilization work during this phase.
# Pull Request Policy

This project is not accepting pull requests yet.

The architecture, privacy posture, safety language, and contribution process are still being stabilized. Please do not submit implementation changes until contribution intake opens.

Security issues must follow `SECURITY.md` and should not be reported through a public pull request.
